summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SingleStore Report Sniffer v1 - both backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with proper branding and functionality

minor_fixes_applied.issue: FastAPI title was 'SDB Insight' instead of 'SingleStore Report Sniffer v1'
minor_fixes_applied.fix_applied: Updated FastAPI title to match the rebranded application name

passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
Report upload functionality (.tar.gz, .tgz, .zip support)
Report processing and status tracking
All 8 backend API endpoints working correctly
Homepage shows 'SingleStore Report Sniffer' title and tagline
Header shows SingleStore logo + 'Report Sniffer' + v1 badge
Browser tab title is 'SingleStore Report Sniffer v1'
Upload dropzone accepts .tar.gz, .tgz, AND .zip formats
Dashboard has dark sidebar (#1A1A2E) with SingleStore white logo
Sidebar shows all 7 navigation items: Overview, Nodes, Storage, Queries, Logs, Config, Issues
Active sidebar item has purple left border (#AA00FF)
Issues tab shows count badge (17)
All 7 tabs load correctly with data
Config tab: OS Tuning, Variables, License, Backups, Users sub-tabs work
Recommendations have 17 doc links that open in new tab
Back navigation '< All Reports' returns to report list
Cards have rounded corners (8px), subtle shadows
Proper SingleStore branding throughout the application
Dark sidebar layout with correct color scheme
Health badge shows 'critical' status correctly
Report data shows 10 nodes, version 8.9.28, 17 recommendations

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and functionality working correctly
success_percentage.branding: 100% - All SingleStore branding elements correctly implemented
